prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Duratorq 3.2L TDCi (Puma engine code: QJDA) with a BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbo (1.05 A/R, 62mm inducer) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a MagnaFlow 17100 catalytic converter and a 3.5-inch straight-pipe setup with a Burns Stainless muffler for optimized backpressure and torque delivery in off-road conditions.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (part # QDF7Z) in the rear axle, paired with a custom 4.88:1 gear ratio set from Currie Enterprises (part # CE-9305) for improved crawl ratio and low-speed torque multiplication. Front and rear CV joints upgraded to GKN heavy-duty units (part # GKN-212015) with reinforced boots for extreme articulation.

Suspension overhaul with Fox 2.5 Factory Series DSC coilovers (part # 985-24-001) featuring remote reservoirs and 14 inches of wheel travel, paired with custom-fabricated polybushings from SuperPro (part # SPF0114K) for the front A-arms and rear trailing arms. Sway bars removed entirely and replaced with a custom hydraulic anti-roll system by Radflo (part # RAD-4X4-T4) for dynamic articulation control.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using fiberglass fender flares from Troller Racing (part # TR-001) extended 3 inches per side, reinforced with aluminum inner stiffeners from RPM Fabrication (part # RPM-T4-FB). Front bumper replaced with a hand-fabricated steel tube bumper from 4x4Labs (part # 4X4-T4-FB) featuring a 30-inch light bar cutout and integrated winch mount for a Warn Zeon 12-S (part # 95960).

Rear bed delete with a custom aluminum flatbed from AluFab (part # ALU-T4-FB) featuring integrated tie-down points and a removable aluminum tonneau cover from UnderCover (part # UC-2200). Roof rack replaced with a custom modular system from Front Runner (part # FR-T4-RR) with a 300kg load rating, paired with a 50-inch LED light bar from Baja Designs (part # 447501).

Full exterior wrap in 3M 1080 Gloss Military Green (part # 3M-1080-G124) with matte black accents on the hood, fender flares, and rocker panels. Custom graphics package by Vinyl Frog featuring a digital camouflage pattern on the doors and tailgate, with Troller Racing decals (part # TR-DECAL-001) on the front fenders and rear quarter panels. Wheels upgraded to Method MR701 Beadlocks (part # MR701-1790-6) in matte black, wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 tires (37x12.50R17) for extreme off-road grip.
